title: Figure 9 from: Wang L, Feng Y-S, Wang L-S, Wang X-Y, Zhang Y-Y (2025) An overview of the genus Lobothallia (lichenized Ascomycota, Megasporaceae) in China. MycoKeys 125: 205-244. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.125.173554
author: Wang, Lun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 9 Lobothallia wangii (KUN-L 85839, holotype). A. Habit; B, C. Apothecia; D. Section of thallus (below in K reagent); E. Upper cortex and epinecral layer (LCB); F. Section of apothecium; G. Section of apothecium (in N reagent); H. Section of pycnidium; I. Ascus and ascospores; J. Paraphyses (LCB); K. Conidia. Scale bars: 1 mm (A); 0.2 mm (B, C); 100 µm (D, G); 20 µm (E, F, H); 10 µm (I); 5 µm (J, K).
